Keep both repos in sync. ## Task Create E2E tests for network failure handling and offline mode. ## Why This Matters - Users have bad connections - Mobile users go offline - Must handle gracefully - No data loss ## Test Scenarios ### 1. Network Failure Handling ```typescript test('should show error message on network failure', async ({ page, context }) => { await page.goto('/dashboard'); // Simulate offline await context.setOffline(true); // Try to load more content await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Load More' }).click(); // Should show offline message await expect(page.getByText(/network.*error|offline/i)).toBeVisible(); }); test('should retry failed requests', async ({ page, context }) => { await page.goto('/dashboard'); // Intercept and fail first request let requestCount = 0; await page.route('**/api/prompts**', async (route) => { requestCount++; if (requestCount === 1) { await route.abort('connectionfailed'); } else { await route.continue(); } }); // Should auto-retry and succeed await page.reload(); await expect(page.getByTestId('prompt-list')).toBeVisible(); expect(requestCount).toBe(2); }); ``` ### 2. Offline Indicator ```typescript test('should show offline indicator when disconnected', async ({ page, context }) => { await page.goto('/dashboard'); await context.setOffline(true); // Should show offline indicator await expect(page.getByTestId('offline-indicator')).toBeVisible(); await context.setOffline(false); // Should hide indicator await expect(page.getByTestId('offline-indicator')).not.toBeVisible(); }); ``` ### 3. Offline Data Access (PWA) ```typescript test('should serve cached prompts when offline', async ({ page, context }) => { // First, visit while online to cache await page.goto('/prompts/test-prompt-id'); await expect(page.getByTestId('prompt-content')).toBeVisible(); // Go offline await context.setOffline(true); // Should still show cached content await page.reload(); await expect(page.getByTestId('prompt-content')).toBeVisible(); await expect(page.getByText(/offline.*cached/i)).toBeVisible(); }); test('should queue actions when offline', async ({ page, context }) => { await page.goto('/prompts/test-prompt-id/edit'); await context.setOffline(true); // Make an edit await page.getByLabel('Title').fill('Updated Title'); await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Save' }).click(); // Should show "queued" message await expect(page.getByText(/saved.*sync/i)).toBeVisible(); // Go back online await context.setOffline(false); // Should sync automatically await expect(page.getByText(/synced/i)).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 }); }); ``` ### 4. Slow Network Handling ```typescript test('should show loading states on slow network', async ({ page }) => { // Simulate slow network const client = await page.context().newCDPSession(page); await client.send('Network.emulateNetworkConditions', { offline: false, downloadThroughput: 50 * 1024, // 50kb/s uploadThroughput: 50 * 1024, latency: 2000, // 2s latency }); await page.goto('/search'); await page.getByPlaceholder('Search').fill('test'); await page.keyboard.press('Enter'); // Should show loading skeleton await expect(page.getByTestId('search-skeleton')).toBeVisible(); }); test('should timeout and show message on very slow network', async ({ page }) => { // Simulate extremely slow network await page.route('**/api/**', async (route) => { await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 30000)); await route.continue(); }); await page.goto('/dashboard'); // Should show timeout message await expect(page.getByText(/taking.*long|timeout/i)).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 }); }); ``` ### 5. Reconnection Handling ```typescript test('should automatically reconnect and refresh', async ({ page, context }) => { await page.goto('/dashboard'); await context.setOffline(true); await page.waitForTimeout(1000); await context.setOffline(false); // Should show reconnection message await expect(page.getByText(/back online|reconnected/i)).toBeVisible(); // Should refresh data await expect(page.getByTestId('last-updated')).toContainText(/just now/i); }); ``` ## Logging Requirements - Log network state changes - Log retry attempts - Log cache hits/misses - Screenshot error states ## Files to Create - e2e/network/failures.spec.ts - e2e/network/offline.spec.ts - e2e/network/slow.spec.ts - e2e/network/reconnection.spec.ts ## Success Criteria - Errors shown clearly - Retries work - Offline mode functions - Reconnection smooth ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:17:22.775310033-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:17:22.775310033-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rhvk","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-2hhc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:30.049598593-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rij8","title":"E2E Tests: Cookie Consent & Analytics Gating","description":"## Origin Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-1gte. {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-tco","title":"Set up CLI configuration system (lib/config.ts)","description":"**Details:** - Configuration file at $HOME/.config/jfp/config.json - Supports: registry URL, cache settings, skills directories, preferences - loadConfig() reads with defaults - saveConfig() persists changes - Environment variable overrides **Config Schema:** ```typescript interface JfpConfig { registry: { url: string; // default: https://jeffreysprompts.com cacheTtl: number; // default: 3600 (1 hour) autoRefresh: boolean; // default: true }; skills: { personalDir: string; // default: $HOME/.config/claude/skills projectDir: string; // default: .claude/skills preferProject: boolean; // default: false }; output: { color: boolean; // default: true (TTY detection) json: boolean; // default: false }; updates: { autoCheck: boolean; // default: true autoUpdate: boolean; // default: false (opt-in) }; } ``` **Implementation:** ```typescript // packages/cli/src/lib/config.ts const CONFIG_PATH = join(homedir(), '.config', 'jfp', 'config.json'); const DEFAULT_CONFIG: JfpConfig = { registry: { url: 'https://jeffreysprompts.com', cacheTtl: 3600, autoRefresh: true, }, skills: { personalDir: join(homedir(), '.config', 'claude', 'skills'), projectDir: '.claude/skills', preferProject: false, }, output: { color: true, json: false, }, updates: { autoCheck: true, autoUpdate: false, }, }; export function loadConfig(): JfpConfig { try { const raw = readFileSync(CONFIG_PATH, 'utf-8'); return { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...JSON.parse(raw) }; } catch { return DEFAULT_CONFIG; } } export function saveConfig(config: Partial): void { const current = loadConfig(); const merged = { ...current, ...config }; mkdirSync(dirname(CONFIG_PATH), { recursive: true }); writeFileSync(CONFIG_PATH, JSON.stringify(merged, null, 2)); } ``` **Environment Overrides:** - JFP_REGISTRY_URL - JFP_CACHE_TTL - JFP_NO_COLOR **Location:** packages/cli/src/lib/config.ts **Reasoning:** Configuration system enables customization without modifying code.
